title: Parma, Emilia-Romagna — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Parma, Emilia-Romagna: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Parma is a city in Emilia-Romagna with a population of 198,000. A food lover’s paradise, famous for Parmigiano-Reggiano, Prosciutto di Parma, and a rich musical and artistic heritage.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
